name: Fresh Trotter Soup
shortDesc: Traditional trotter soup slow-cooked for hours with fresh beef trotters, onion, garlic and bay leaf — rich in collagen
metaDesc: Çorbacı fresh trotter soup. Prepared daily with natural ingredients, slow-cooked and rich in collagen.
keywords: fresh trotter soup, paça soup, traditional trotter, corbaci soup
longDesc: Fresh beef trotters are slow-cooked for over 12 hours with garlic, onion and bay leaf over a low flame
The deep bone broth base gives the soup a rich, velvety texture and a satisfying aroma
Only meat, bone broth and natural spices are used — no additives or preservatives
Serve hot with crushed garlic and vinegar to bring out the full traditional flavour
Rich in collagen and protein, it makes a nourishing meal that also supports the immune system
